raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Set the frame","name":"Before we get specific, what would be most useful to talk through today?","description":"A calm opener that lets James set context before the conversation turns toward any concern.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ritual shift","name":"I've noticed you've been quieter in team rituals lately — what's the story there?","description":"Uses an observable shift to invite James to explain the change in participation without assuming the cause.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"What landed","name":"What did you take from the promotion decision?","description":"Surfaces the meaning James assigned to the outcome and whether the message was clear or muddled.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Under the surface","name":"What's been harder to put into words about work lately?","description":"Gives James room to name whatever is underneath the visible shift without forcing a diagnosis.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision meaning","name":"How has that decision changed what feels worth leaning into right now?","description":"Explores whether the promotion outcome has altered motivation, ownership, or focus.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring shape","name":"What does the mentoring program ask of your week in practice?","description":"Checks whether mentoring is a healthy stretch or taking real time and attention away from core work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Core path","name":"Where does mentoring fit in the path you want over the next year?","description":"Elicits whether mentoring is aligned with James's longer-term trajectory or pulling him sideways.","purpose":"competency","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Forward view","name":"What concrete path forward makes sense to you from here?","description":"Asks James to articulate the next step he believes in, rather than waiting for the manager to define it.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation toward immediate support and practical stabilizers.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
